name: dmtap-sync-wasm
description: Vendored copy of the DMTAP Sync substrate WASM binding (envoir/crates/dmtap-sync-wasm) — the shared CRDT algebra (HLC, LWW register, OR-Set, PN-counter, RGA, death certificates, movable tree) compiled once and used from both Rust and JS. See VENDOR.md for the sync-from-upstream step.
